interfaces.notes: General description and pin tables show dual CSI-2 output with both D-PHY and C-PHY support.
Pin tables and C-PHY sections confirm C-PHY transmit support; trio count is not yet normalized from the source.
Control and side-channel text confirms bidirectional I2C transport across the GMSL links.

notes: General description states dual GMSL2/GMSL1 serial inputs.
Control-channel and side-channel text confirms simultaneous control transport over each serial link.
C-PHY support is source-backed, but trio-count normalization is still pending.
C-PHY support is source-backed, but trio-count normalization is still pending.

serial_video_bridge.selection_note: Freeze serial-link family, transport media, CSI-2 PHY mode, and downstream receiver compatibility before schematic sign-off.
review_items: Freeze coax vs STP assumptions, connector ownership, and PoC policy for the selected serial link.
Freeze D-PHY vs C-PHY mode and lane/trio allocation against the downstream SoC or bridge.
Verify sensor-control tunneling, lock observability, frame-sync ownership, and sideband GPIO usage.
